# Use updated actions for comments

**oredavids** commented *May 16, 2025*

Starts the process of using the binary for job comments.
- [Tested](https://github.com/gruntwork-test/infra-live-e2e-20250523211322-dbe8-1/pull/2) against `pipelines.yml`. 
- [Tested](https://github.com/gruntwork-io-demo/demo3-infrastructure-live-root/pull/245) against`pipelines-root.yml`. Account factory code paths may be in a broken state because of the status-update action swap.
